name: linear-todo-notifier
description: Checks your assigned Linear Todo tickets every 30 minutes and sends Slack DM reminders, plus a daily 10:00 AM IST report for yesterday-created Todo tickets.

agent_metadata.domain: Personal productivity automation for Linear and Slack
agent_metadata.schedule_description: Every 30 minutes for reminders, plus a daily report at 10:00 AM IST.
